prompt: Create a dark cinematic fantasy close-up in a 16:9 widescreen frame: a rugged warrior or shaman stands on the left side of the composition, partially turned in profile, wearing a massive weathered dragon-skull headdress that extends to the right with bony teeth, spikes, horns, cracked scales, and reddish thorn-like protrusions. The character has long dark hair with one visible thick reddish-brown braid, a visible ear, and a rough fur cloak over the shoulder. Place a large opaque dark olive-black rectangular block over the center of the image, covering most of the character’s face and torso area like an intentional censor mask. The background is out of focus, foggy, and teal-green, suggesting a bleak outdoor medieval or tribal battlefield setting with vague silhouettes of posts or structures. Use shallow depth of field, moody low-key lighting, muted green-brown color grading, gritty texture, realistic creature-bone detail, and an ominous atmospheric tone inspired by grim mythic fantasy cinema. The headdress should have exactly one prominent dragon skull head visible on the right, one visible braid, one fur shoulder mass, and one central censor rectangle. No text, no watermark, no bright colors.
